sorted_lst = sorted(lst)
    res = []
    left = 0
    right = len(sorted_lst) - 1
    while left <= right:
        if left == right:
            res.append(sorted_lst[left])
            left += 1
        else:
            res.append(sorted_lst[left])
            res.append(sorted_lst[right])
            left += 1
            right -= 1
    return res
